title: Consortium space station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Zann Consortium}}
The '''Consortium Space Station''' was a series of [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] built and used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
Consortium Space Station were produced in different levels (Level 1 being the weakest and Level 5 the strongest). Level 3 and up Consortium space stations were armed with a [[Plasma cannon/Legends|plasma cannon]] that were capable of delivering lethal blows. They could also be armed with [[Pulse cannon/Legends|pulse cannons]] and other light defenses, which could be heavily upgraded beyond their original specifications. The level 1 space station is considered huge for it level compred to the imperial and rebel ones but the size barely increases as the level continued and it considered small when compared to the rebel class 5 one the Cardan Class 5 one is small compared to it.

They were the equivalent to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Cardan-class space station|''Cardan''-class space station]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Alliance Space Station]].

==History==
One known location of such space stations was at [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. This station had been there since Zann and [[Urai Fen]] schemed against [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]], and possibly even before then. Other factions were known to use this class of space station besides the Consortium.
